_purpose: Hardcoded sample slide plan used by extract-brand to render a single preview slide with the candidate brand. Do not delete; the extract-brand skill imports this file directly.

slides.title: This is a one-slide preview rendered with your extracted brand.
slides.body: If the colors, typography, and logo placement look right, approve in chat. If anything is off, tell the agent what to change or edit brand-candidate.json directly.
